purpose: Left sidebar for the Chat tab. Owns the three primary sub-view switchers (Dashboard / Make / New chat), the list of existing chat tabs with per-tab status dot, project badge, action menu (Project configuration / Rename / Delete), and the multi-step new-chat flow. Drives a 3-step new-chat workflow: (1) Yes/No 'Associate a Project?' popup, (2) optional ProjectModal scoped to a 'pending-chat-<ts>' pseudo-id, (3) finalize via window.electronAPI.createChatAgent which allocates a 4-hex agent and creates Chat/chat{N}/agent{XXXX}/ on disk, then re-keys the persisted project from the pending pseudo-id to the real 'chat-agent-<hex>' id and dispatches CHAT_TAB_CREATE. Computes per-tab live status (idle / processing / unread) from currentDashboardId, claudeIsProcessing, claudeProcessingStash, and unreadChatCounts. Manages collapse state (writes --sidebar-width CSS var), inline rename via double-click, popup rename, and delete-confirmation modal. Handles a click-outside listener to dismiss the per-tab action menu.
gotchas: TWO project keys are involved during new-chat: a transient 'pending-chat-<timestamp>' written by ProjectModal during the flow, and the real 'chat-agent-<hex>' written in finalizeNewChat AFTER createChatAgent succeeds. The pending key is INTENTIONALLY orphaned in localStorage — do not treat its presence as authoritative.

ProjectModal's onSave/onClose lifecycle is asymmetric: Save fires onSave THEN onClose; Cancel/X fires onClose ALONE. projectSavedRef guards against carrying over a clicked-but-not-saved selection. If you change ProjectModal to call onSave on Cancel you will silently start associating projects users rejected.

settingsTabId path uses tab.agentHex to derive 'chat-agent-<hex>' as the dashboard id — DIFFERENT from the new-chat pseudo-id. settingsTabId modal does NOT pass onSave/onProjectSelected because ProjectModal handles persistence itself when given a real dashboard id; do not unify the two ProjectModal usages.

Chat status dot resolution: when the chat is the active dashboard, processing comes from claudeIsProcessing; otherwise from claudeProcessingStash[dashId].isProcessing. Forgetting the stash branch will make non-active tabs always show idle.
The Yes/No project-prompt overlay reuses 'sidebar-delete-overlay' / 'sidebar-delete-popup' classes — same DOM/CSS as Delete and Rename popups; cosmetic changes affect all three.

Inline rename (double-click) and popup rename are TWO separate flows controlled by editingId vs renameTabId — keep them mutually exclusive; both writing simultaneously yields duplicate CHAT_TAB_RENAME dispatches.
menuRef is conditionally assigned only to the OPEN tab's wrapper (ref={menuOpenTabId === tab.id ? menuRef : null}); the click-outside listener relies on this — never spread the ref across all tabs.
patterns: Multi-step modal flow with refs (pickedProjectRef, projectSavedRef, pendingChatKeyRef) to bridge async user choices into a single finalize call — refs are used because the values must NOT trigger re-renders.
Pseudo-id project storage: chat tabs reuse the dashboardProjects localStorage util by passing 'chat-agent-<hex>' (or transient 'pending-chat-<ts>') instead of a real dashboard slug.
Status dot tri-state derived from cross-slice context (currentDashboardId + claudeIsProcessing + claudeProcessingStash + unreadChatCounts).
Sidebar collapse drives a CSS custom property (--sidebar-width) on document.documentElement so unrelated panels can react without prop drilling.
All chat-tab actions dispatch through AppContext (CHAT_TAB_CREATE / CHAT_TAB_SWITCH / CHAT_TAB_RENAME / CHAT_TAB_DELETE / SET_CHAT_VIEW) — sidebar holds NO chat tab state itself.
conventions: Hex agent ids are 4-character lowercase produced by createChatAgent IPC; ALWAYS prefixed with 'chat-agent-' before being used as a dashboard key.
'pending-chat-<timestamp>' is the transient pseudo-key for the new-chat flow; never persist this beyond finalize.
All popup overlays share '.sidebar-delete-overlay' / '.sidebar-delete-popup' class skeleton (associate-project, rename, delete) — keep them visually consistent.
Action menu items use class 'chat-tab-menu-item'; destructive actions add 'chat-tab-menu-item-danger'.

depends_on: src/ui/context/AppContext.jsx (chatTabs, chatActiveTabId, chatActiveView, currentDashboardId, claudeIsProcessing, claudeProcessingStash, unreadChatCounts; CHAT_TAB_* and SET_CHAT_VIEW reducer actions)
depended_by: src/ui/App.jsx (rendered as the Chat tab's sidebar)
related: src/ui/components/chat/ChatInstanceView.jsx (consumes the same agentHex to derive chatAgentId)
electron/services/ConversationService.js (manages on-disk Chat/chat{N}/agent{XXXX}/ folders that createChatAgent allocates)
